mechanism: Alkamides, caffeic acid derivatives, and polysaccharides can modulate innate immune signaling (including cytokine and cannabinoid-receptor-linked pathways).
contraindications: Use caution with prescription medications and chronic conditions; monitor for intolerance.
safetyNotes: Short-term use is generally tolerated; rash or hypersensitivity can occur, especially in people with Asteraceae allergy or atopic disease.
